title: Everybody Dance
writer: Leslie Arliss, Stafford Dickens, Ralph Spence
actors: Cicely Courtneidge, Ernest Truex, Percy Parsons
plot: When her sister dies, a nightclub singer is left with her children. In order to raise the children properly, she leaves her singing career and takes her new family to a farm. However, her greedy manager--seeing his "cash cow" slip...
